title.rendered: Why Should Your Enterprise Care About Firmware Security?

content.rendered:
Firmware security should be a priority for all organizations. Our Senior Director, Product, Zach Bobroff, authored a piece for GRCViewpoint detailing why enterprises should care about their firmware security.

You can read the full article here: https://grcviewpoint.com/why-should-your-enterprise-care-about-firmware-security/.
